def positive_django_delete_single_in_loop():
    rule_id = "django_delete_single_in_loop"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Django code deletes individual models inside loops instead of using set-based queryset deletion."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
